commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the Settings view to sync the native Settings window toolbar appearance with the app appearance on view appear and SwiftUI color-scheme changes.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible: current main has Settings window resizing but no appearance sync path, and the PR screenshots show the stale toolbar mismatch. I did not run a live macOS appearance toggle in this read-only review.
